name: linkedin-post-writer
description: Convert blog posts to native LinkedIn posts (text + 7-10 slide carousel), 2026 algorithm-optimized. 5 skills + 1 agent: brief router, text post writer, carousel composer with per-slide image prompts, Depth Score validator (>=80 gate), and end-to-end orchestrator. 12 text hook formulas, 5 cover hook frameworks, 20-rule anti-slop rubric. Pure content generation — emits draft JSON for an admin panel to consume. Built on 127-source RAG research.
